pr.title: feat(ui): /family action-first redesign (Figma Manage Family V2)

receipt.goal: Tighten `/family` parity to Figma code: add child tabs, strict 4-up household tools row, Figma-style reminders/gift elements, dynamic pulse text, and quick-add modal journey while preserving real Ember plumbing.
decisions_made: Child tabs are dynamic from real children rows (`All` + each child), not hardcoded names.
Quick-add modal matches Figma journey but routes to existing `/discover` flow for actual save plumbing.
Both reminders switches map to existing reminders preference to avoid dead toggles.
verification_steps: Lint/TS: `pnpm exec eslint` on modified `/family` component.
receipt.rollback_plan: Revert/close the PR and switch back to `main` (no DB/schema changes were made).
